visual_description: An older man with short gray hair, wearing a black shirt, is on a phone call. He is sitting in a dimly lit, opulent room with a large golden statue visible to his right and a chandelier in the background. His expression is serious and contemplative as he listens and speaks into the phone.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese in a calm, conversational tone. The audio is clear and the speech is easily understandable.
